name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: News Release: Senator Roberts: American Farmers and Ranchers Don’t Need #GreenNewDeal to Be Green   https://t.co/jL0f9jBdmy

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: In hampering American agriculture, the #GreenNewDeal does not match up with these moral responsibilities.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: I realize there are those who think the GND is a moral imperative.  But, farmers continuing to feed the world is also a moral imperative.  Too many go hungry each day in America, ending this is also a moral imperative.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: These policy discussions must recognize the complexity of the agriculture and food value chain—growers, input suppliers, processors, handlers, and consumers.  And, they must be based in reality to facilitate a genuine conversation between rural and urban constituencies.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: Consumers will assuredly continue to demand the choice of animal protein here in the U.S., and so any reasonable discussion on the agriculture sector’s contributions to solutions on climate change must begin with this acknowledgment.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: Regulating American farmers and ranchers out of business will only result in food and fiber production being outsourced to countries that do not have the same conservation-minded producers that we have here in the U.S.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: Over the last 50 years American farmers have reduced water use in pork production by 41%.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: American farmers and ranchers raise the same amount of beef today as they did in the 1970s, but they do so with 33% fewer cattle.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: Obviously, we cannot, and do not, produce food in the same manner our grandparents did, because those methods were not sustainable and today would not produce food at the scope and scale our troubled and hungry world demands.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: American farmers, ranchers, and others in rural America are constantly working to produce their crops and to raise their livestock in order to feed a growing world, and do so with constant challenges presented to them from Mother Nature.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: The @FoundationFAR leverages public and private dollars to bring together experts to identify and investigate the researchable questions whose answers have the potential to enhance the economic and environmental resilience of our food supply.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: I do not question the intent of the authors of the #GreenNewDeal but they don’t know what they don’t know. They need to catch up with the Agriculture committee and with farm country.

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: within agriculture, there is nothing “New” with the #GreenNewDeal

name: Senator Pat Roberts
tweet: To Supporters of the #GreenNewDeal: The men & women who make their living off the land have an imperative & keen interest in responsible use of natural resources. Show me a farmer who does not practice conservation or does not use latest tech & I will show you a farmer in trouble
